source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A certain diode has a reverse bias current of $1.0 \times 10^{-5}$ A. Now this diode is connected in forward bias in the circuit shown below, in series with a resistor and with a constant voltage source. What is the wavelength of a photon required to excite a transition from $l=0$ to $l=1$?
